title: NOMOS Public Query Request
description: Request body for POST /query (NOMOS-SPEC-005 §1) — a keyless query against a public sealed artifact. No authentication, no domain scoping.

inputs.description: Key-value map of decision factors. Field names SHOULD match the artifact's data contract. A conformant runtime MUST NOT reject unrecognised keys and MUST NOT default an absent field to false/0/"" when evaluating a condition that depends on it.

action.description: Optional human-readable label for what is being asked. Recorded verbatim in the transcript. Does not affect rule evaluation.

examples.action: screen a new feature before launch
